final:
module RefModule(
    input clk,
    input reset,
    input [3:0] state,
    input [3:0] reference,
    output reg [3:0] control
);
    always @(posedge clk or posedge reset) begin
        if (reset) begin
            control <= 4'b0000;
        end else begin
            control <= reference - state; // Implementing a simple deadbeat control
        end
    end
endmodule
